commands.help: Request an enrollment certificate from an AD certificate authority
commands.long_help: Connects to a certificate authority and requests an enrollment certificate of the specified type. Supports custom subject, alternative name, SAN URL, and optional certificate installation. Can request user or machine certificates. Supports ESC15 via app policy flag.

arguments.name: ca
arguments.desc: Certificate authority to request from (e.g., cert.example.org\example-CERT-CA)

arguments.name: template
arguments.desc: Certificate template to request. Empty string for default (User/Machine)

arguments.name: subject
arguments.desc: Subject distinguished name (e.g., CN=Administrator,CN=Users,DC=example,DC=org). Empty for current user/machine

arguments.name: alt-name
arguments.desc: Alternative subject distinguished name. Empty to omit

arguments.name: alt-url
arguments.desc: SAN URL entry, can specify alternate subject SID (e.g., tag:microsoft.com,2022-09-14:sid:S-1-5-21-...). Empty to omit

arguments.name: install
arguments.desc: Install certificate in current context: 0 = no, 1 = yes

arguments.name: machine
arguments.desc: Request machine certificate instead of user: 0 = no, 1 = yes

arguments.name: app-policy
arguments.desc: Add app policy for client auth and certificate agent (ESC15): 0 = no, 1 = yes

arguments.name: dns
arguments.desc: Treat alt-name as DNS name instead of UPN: 0 = no, 1 = yes
